CustomField.defaultValue: IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense USA') , 'Hisense USA', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'USA(OEM)') , 'NA OEM Sales Dept.', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Mexico') , 'Hisense Mexico', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Australia') , 'Hisense Australia', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Malaysia') , 'Hisense Malaysia', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense South Africa') , 'Hisense South Africa', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Canada') , 'Hisense Canada', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Thailand') , 'Hisense Thailand', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense India') , 'Hisense India', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Indonesia') , 'Hisense Indonesia', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Chile') , 'Hisense Chile', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Dubai') , 'Hisense Dubai', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Columbia') , 'Hisense Columbia', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense West Africa') , 'Hisense West Africa', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Philippines') , 'Hisense Philippines', IF(ISPICKVAL($User.Sales_Region__c, 'Communications Sales Department') , 'Communications Sales Department', '') ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Sales Region
